title: nephrolepis celebica
intro: Nephrolepis celebica, also known as the Boston fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This epiphytic fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrolepis celebica include its potential to reduce stress, improve respiratory health, and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
